titles.title: Glasses with a Chance of Delinquent
メガネ、時々、ヤンキーくん

data.title: Megane, Tokidoki, Yankee-kun
data.title_japanese: メガネ、時々、ヤンキーくん
title_synonyms: Glasses with a Chance of Delinquent
data.synopsis:
In middle school, Hiro Momose was bullied and forced to be an errand girl for delinquents. Now a high school freshman, she is hoping to turn over a new leaf. Although the requirement states that each student must join a club, the clumsy Hiro is rejected by every club she has visited. Because of this, she ends up joining the "Helper's Club," a group on the verge of disbanding with Dan Ichikura as its sole member.

On the surface, Ichikura seems like the perfect boy—boasting good grades, athleticism, and a reliable nature. However, he harbors a secret that hits a bit too close to home for Hiro: he was once a delinquent. When she finds out, Ichikura swears her to secrecy. Now, Hiro must avoid returning to her middle school days and make this chance encounter work out for them both.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: Garou Densetsu: CotW - Wolfgang Krauser - Long Animation Trailer
餓狼伝説 CotW｜ヴォルフガング・クラウザー｜ロングアニメーショントレーラー
Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves - Wolfgang Krauser Trailer

data.title: Garou Densetsu: CotW - Wolfgang Krauser
data.title_english: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves - Wolfgang Krauser Trailer
data.title_japanese: 餓狼伝説 CotW｜ヴォルフガング・クラウザー｜ロングアニメーショントレーラー
title_synonyms: Garou Densetsu: CotW - Wolfgang Krauser - Long Animation Trailer
data.synopsis:
Wolfgang Krauser special anime short by Masami Oobari.

The mighty Wolfgang Krauser, once feared as the Emperor of Darkness, rises from the ashes and casts a sinister shadow across South Town in his quest for vengeance. Will the city's resilient wolves—Terry Bogard, Andy Bogard, and Joe Higashi—be able to thwart his attempted takeover? Strap in for the intense action that ensues as the streets play host to a brutal battle between good and evil—all in the dynamic visual style that world-renowned animator Masami Obari does best.

(Source: YouTube)
data.background: This trailer is to promote the Season 2 DLC for Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves video game, with the story took place after the game's arcade mode endings.
